title: Match Insight Coach
problem: Turn match stats into a training focus
example_input: City U15 vs Rivals: 62% possession, 18 shots, 4 on target
evidence_1: High shot volume with low shot accuracy
evidence_2: Most chances came from wide areas
recommendation: Prioritize finishing after wide cutbacks, then add a transition-defense cue to the next session
next_step: Test with one coach and ask whether the output changes the next training plan

title: Student Project Helper
problem: Shape a broad AI idea into a testable prototype
example_input: Idea: AI assistant for planning a community event
evidence_1: The user has a real but broad idea
evidence_2: The first prototype needs one clear journey
evidence_3: Feedback is more useful than feature completeness
recommendation: Start with a clickable flow that turns an event goal into a draft task list and feedback prompt
next_step: Show the shell to two peers before adding integrations

title: Support Triage Assistant
problem: Sort messy support notes into an action plan
example_input: Notes: three customers report login confusion after onboarding email
evidence_1: Repeated confusion appears in the same journey step
evidence_2: The issue affects new users before activation
evidence_3: Support notes contain enough context for a mocked recommendation
recommendation: Create a triage summary with likely cause, sample reply, and one product question
next_step: Ask a support lead if the evidence shown is enough to trust the recommendation
